styleLock: Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon (Clash of Clans / Brawl Stars aesthetic): chunky proportions with oversized heads and stubby limbs, exaggerated hand-painted textures, soft painterly shading with a clear primary light source from top-left and warm rim light from the right, thick dark brown outlines about 2-3% of the subject width so the silhouette pops on any background, hand-painted normal maps suggested through the shading (no hard rim lighting, no cel-shading bands), subsurface glow on translucent bits. Palette: warm backyard colony — deep mossy greens (#1d3a1a, #2c4724, #3d7a2c), warm brass and gold accents (#ffd98a, #b97e1c) for highlights, soft earth browns (#3a2512, #6b4420) for outlines and woodwork, never pastel. Top-down 3/4 perspective around 30 degrees. Soft oval drop shadow directly under the subject, about 70% alpha, never a hard cast shadow. 128x128 transparent PNG (RGBA alpha=0 outside the subject), subject fills ~85% of the canvas centered, no background, no ground plane, no grass tufts, no text, no watermark, no border, no caption. Cohesive, production-grade game asset quality.

factions.Bees: lemon yellow with black stripes, gauzy wings
factions.Spiders: deep purple with neon green eyes

units.WorkerAnt: a cheerful worker ant, six legs, carrying a tiny leaf over its head, tiny backpack
units.SoldierAnt: a sturdy soldier ant, oversized mandibles, wearing a paper crown, confident stance
units.DirtDigger: a burly ant with comically oversized front claws for digging, goggles, stubborn expression
units.Forager: a fuzzy bee with a tiny satchel of nectar, cute wings
units.Wasp: a sleek wasp with a stinger, bandit mask over eyes, determined glare
units.HoneyTank: a round, armored bee draped in honeycomb plates, slow and imposing
units.ShieldBeetle: a tank-like beetle with a riveted metal shield carapace, small legs
units.BombBeetle: a cute beetle carrying a dandelion-puff bomb above its head, wide eyes
units.Roller: a muscular beetle rolling a dew droplet like a wrecking ball
units.Jumper: a jumping spider, fuzzy legs, cat-like alert pose
units.WebSetter: a spinner spider weaving a glowing silver web between tiny twigs
units.Ambusher: a camouflaged spider peeking from under a leaf, only eyes visible

walkCycles.WorkerAnt: a 4-frame horizontal walk-cycle spritesheet (one 512x128 strip, four 128x128 frames side by side, no gutters between frames), same cheerful worker ant carrying a tiny leaf — identical character, identical scale, identical camera across all four frames. Frame 1: left legs forward, right legs back, body leaning slightly forward. Frame 2: legs crossed, body centered. Frame 3: right legs forward, left legs back, body leaning slightly forward. Frame 4: legs crossed, body centered (mirror of frame 2). Transparent background across the whole strip. Same style lock.
walkCycles.SoldierAnt: a 4-frame horizontal walk-cycle spritesheet (one 512x128 strip, four 128x128 frames side by side, no gutters between frames), same sturdy soldier ant with oversized mandibles and paper crown — identical character, identical scale, identical camera across all four frames. Frame 1: left legs forward, right legs back, marching stride. Frame 2: legs crossed, mandibles forward. Frame 3: right legs forward, left legs back. Frame 4: legs crossed, mandibles forward. Transparent background across the whole strip. Same style lock.
walkCycles.Wasp: a 4-frame horizontal hover-cycle spritesheet (one 512x128 strip, four 128x128 frames side by side, no gutters between frames), same sleek wasp with bandit mask — identical character, identical scale, identical camera across all four frames. Frames show a wingbeat cycle: wings up / wings halfway down / wings fully down / wings halfway up. Body position constant, legs tucked. Transparent background across the whole strip. Same style lock.

buildings.QueenChamber: a majestic glowing queen chamber on layered dirt mound, lit from within, throne-like silhouette
buildings.DewCollector: a shimmering dew drop suspended in a twig cradle, rain-catcher
buildings.MushroomTurret: a red-capped mushroom turret with a small cannon in the stem, white dots
buildings.LeafWall: a tall overlapping leaf wall woven with spider silk, organic ridge
buildings.PebbleBunker: a fortress of stacked river pebbles, moss in the cracks
buildings.LarvaNursery: a cozy domed nursery with glowing larva pods visible through oval windows
buildings.SugarVault: a wooden vault door with a giant sugar-cube lock, sprinkles around it
buildings.TunnelJunction: a clean carved earth tunnel entrance, multiple paths radiating out
buildings.DungeonTrap: a disguised pitfall covered with twigs and leaves, ominous shadow inside

menuUi.ui-button-primary-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style game button background, rich brass gold gradient top-to-bottom, thick carved wooden border in warm dark brown (#3a2512), soft painted highlight along the top edge (purely lighting, NOT a 3D tilt), subtle inner glow. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed straight from the front with zero perspective, zero isometric tilt, zero foreshortening — the rectangle reads as a perfectly axis-aligned rectangle. Painterly but crisp, 256x128 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling (safe center region for stretching, corners hold the ornamentation). No text, no icons, no logos — just the button surface.
menuUi.ui-button-secondary-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style game button background in mossy forest green, deep green bottom to lighter leaf green top, thick carved wooden border in dark brown, top highlight painted on as lighting only (NOT a perspective bevel), subtle leaf-vein texture in the fill. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed perfectly straight-on with zero perspective, zero tilt, zero isometric angle — the rectangle is axis-aligned. Painterly finish, 256x128 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-panel-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style game panel / card background, wood-plank texture in warm deep brown tones, corners reinforced with brass rivets, painterly shading with soft inner glow at the top, dark around the edges like an aged signboard. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, straight-on camera, zero perspective, zero isometric tilt, zero foreshortening — the panel reads as an axis-aligned rectangle. 512x256 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling so the plank grain can tile the center. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-hud-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style horizontal HUD / top-banner background, deep forest-green leather with brass trim top and bottom, ornamental scrollwork corners in brass, thick painterly shading. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed perfectly straight from the front with zero perspective, zero tilt — axis-aligned rectangle only. 512x96 pixels transparent PNG, designed to tile horizontally. The middle should be a plain enough texture that resource pills sit on top without visual clash. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-title-banner: a Clash-of-Clans style decorative title banner ribbon, warm brass / gold ribbon sash with carved wooden backing and leaf flourishes at each end, ornate scrollwork. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewer directly in front of the banner, zero perspective, zero tilt, zero isometric angle — the banner reads as a symmetrical front-facing shape. Painterly depth via lighting only, not camera angle. 512x128 pixels transparent PNG. Empty central area so the game title can be drawn on top. No text.
menuUi.ui-board-tile-surface: a Clash-of-Clans style seamless grass / moss ground tile for a backyard colony game, hand-painted strict top-down (bird's-eye) view directly from above, zero perspective, zero isometric tilt, zero foreshortening — the tile is a perfectly flat top-down square. Mossy green (#2c4724 to #3d7a2c) with tiny pebbles, flower petals, dirt patches, painterly stylized not photographic, 128x128 pixels tileable PNG (edges match so the tile repeats seamlessly). Warm soft ambient lighting (no hard directional shadows that would imply a tilted camera). No text, no buildings, no characters — just ground.
